description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux x86 that runs on pushes to the master branch, pull requests, releases, and workflow dispatches, excluding changes to markdown files and documentation. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-20.04 environment with a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It checks out the repository, works around broken packages, installs dependencies including x86 libraries and gcc-13, caches the CMake build folder, builds the project, packages it, uploads the package as an artifact, and updates a release with the package.
